title: Migrate to PostgreSQL
rationale: The team evaluated MySQL vs PostgreSQL for the new Billing Service and chose PostgreSQL for its native JSONB support and stronger consistency guarantees.

title: Adopt GraphQL API
rationale: Frontend and Backend Core agreed to adopt GraphQL for the Mobile Gateway to reduce over-fetching and unify the API surface across web and mobile clients.

title: Kill Feature: Legacy Reports
rationale: Usage data showed under 2 percent adoption of the legacy reporting module, so the Analytics team deprecated it in favor of the new Analytics Dashboard.

title: Introduce Security Review Gate
rationale: Following an incident in the Payments flow, Security introduced a mandatory review gate for any service touching payment data before it can ship.

title: Split Monolith into Services
rationale: Platform and Backend Core agreed to split the monolith into Payments API, User Service and Notification Service to reduce deploy coupling.

title: Move CI to GitHub Actions
rationale: DevOps migrated the build pipeline off Jenkins to GitHub Actions to cut build times and simplify onboarding for new repositories.

title: Adopt Feature Flags
rationale: Growth and Platform introduced a feature flag service to decouple deploys from releases and support progressive rollouts.

title: Cloud Migration to Multi-Region
rationale: Platform and Security jointly decided to migrate core services to a multi region cloud footprint to meet new data residency requirements.

title: Standardize on Terraform
rationale: Standardize on Terraform was adopted after review by the owning team to reduce operational risk and improve delivery velocity around Recommendation Engine.

title: Consolidate Logging to OpenTelemetry
rationale: Consolidate Logging to OpenTelemetry was adopted after review by the owning team to reduce operational risk and improve delivery velocity around Notification Service.

rationale: Retire the Legacy Monolith was adopted after review by the owning team to reduce operational risk and improve delivery velocity around Mobile Gateway.
